description_long: This is an ornate, lidded plate or serving dish with an oval shape, featuring intricate raised floral and leaf motifs around the rim and lid. The main body is a creamy beige color with delicate pink flower accents and gold-toned highlights, giving it an antique or vintage appearance. The lid is topped with a small, sculpted knob resembling a flower bud or fruit, which serves as a handle. The plate stands on four short, decorative feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design suggests it is made from ceramic or porcelain, possibly with hand-painted details. The craftsmanship and embellishments indicate it is intended for decorative or formal serving purposes.
description: An ornate, oval lidded plate with raised floral motifs, pink accents, and a decorative knob, standing on four short feet.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the detailed floral patterns on the lid and rim, with the decorative knob clearly visible at the top center.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the elongated oval shape and the intricate leaf motifs encircling the plate, with the feet partially visible.
description_view_2: The angled view shows the curvature of the lid and the prominence of the raised decorations, as well as the knob's sculpted detail.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side, revealing the symmetry of the floral patterns and the four supporting feet beneath the plate.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative floral and leaf patterns are visible on the lid and rim; no text or logos visible.
